subcodes.title: Words to pilgrims in June 1906
subcodes.first_line: These Bahá'í Feasts are celebrated in the East according to the lunar calendar. We also celebrate them here in accord with the lunar reckoning.
subcodes.subjects: @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @moderation; frugality; simplicity
